channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-16865] replay-vbr: FAIL: link should fail
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Minh Diep <mdiep@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/3e4513a0-4d26-4caf-9bcf-ae5c4995bce5

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-b2_15/63 - 5.4.0-110-generic
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-b2_15/63 - 4.18.0-477.10.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

<<Please provide additional information about the failure here>>

mount facets: mds1
CMD: onyx-72vm9 dmsetup status /dev/mapper/mds1_flakey >/dev/null 2>&1
CMD: onyx-72vm9 dmsetup status /dev/mapper/mds1_flakey 2>&1
CMD: onyx-72vm9 dmsetup table /dev/mapper/mds1_flakey
CMD: onyx-72vm9 dmsetup suspend --nolockfs --noflush /dev/mapper/mds1_flakey
CMD: onyx-72vm9 dmsetup load /dev/mapper/mds1_flakey --table \"0 4194304 linear 252:0 0\"
CMD: onyx-72vm9 dmsetup resume /dev/mapper/mds1_flakey
CMD: onyx-72vm9 test -b /dev/mapper/mds1_flakey
CMD: onyx-72vm9 e2label /dev/mapper/mds1_flakey
Starting mds1: -o localrecov /dev/mapper/mds1_flakey /mnt/lustre-mds1
CMD: onyx-72vm9 mkdir -p /mnt/lustre-mds1; mount -t lustre -o localrecov /dev/mapper/mds1_flakey /mnt/lustre-mds1
CMD: onyx-72vm9 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n health_check
CMD: onyx-72vm9 PATH=/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/mpi:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer:/usr/lib64/lustre/../lustre-iokit/sgpdd-survey:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils/gss:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin:/usr/games:/usr/local/games:/snap/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin::/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin: NAME=autotest_config bash rpc.sh set_default_debug \"vfstrace rpctrace dlmtrace neterror ha config ioctl super lfsck\" \"all\" 4
onyx-72vm9: CMD: onyx-72vm9 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n version 2>/dev/null
onyx-72vm9: CMD: onyx-72vm9 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n version 2>/dev/null
onyx-72vm9: CMD: onyx-72vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n version 2>/dev/null
onyx-72vm9: CMD: onyx-72vm9.onyx.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n version 2>/dev/null
onyx-72vm9: onyx-72vm9.onyx.whamcloud.com: executing set_default_debug vfstrace rpctrace dlmtrace neterror ha config ioctl super lfsck all 4
CMD: onyx-72vm9 e2label /dev/mapper/mds1_flakey 2>/dev/null | grep -E ':[a-zA-Z]

{3}

[0-9]

{4}

'
CMD: onyx-72vm9 e2label /dev/mapper/mds1_flakey 2>/dev/null
Started lustre-MDT0000
onyx-72vm5: error: invalid path '/mnt/lustre': Input/output error
CMD: onyx-72vm5.onyx.whamcloud.com checkstat -v -a /mnt/lustre/d5b.replay-vbr/f5b.replay-vbr
Can't lstat /mnt/lustre/d5b.replay-vbr/f5b.replay-vbr: Cannot send after transport endpoint shutdown
replay-vbr test_5b: @@@@@@ FAIL: link should fail
Trace dump:
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6426:error_and_remount()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/replay-vbr.sh:567:test_5b()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6723:run_one()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6770:run_one_logged()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6611:run_test()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/replay-vbr.sh:570:main()
Dumping lctl log to /autotest/autotest-1/2023-05-27/lustre-b2_15_full-part-2_63_35_e9a3a829-85ff-4650-81e2-c84fb3b95e36//replay-vbr.test_5b.*.1685182469.log
CMD: onyx-72vm5.onyx.whamcloud.com,onyx-72vm6,onyx-72vm8,onyx-72vm9 /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /autotest/autotest-1/2023-05-27/lustre-b2_15_full-part-2_63_35_e9a3a829-85ff-4650-81e2-c84fb3b95e36//replay-vbr.test_5b.debug_log.\$(hostname -s).1685182469.log;
dmesg > /autotest/autotest-1/2023-05-27/lustre-b2_15_full-part-2_63_35_e9a3a829-85ff-4650-81e2-c84fb3b95e36//replay-vbr.test_5b.dmesg.\$(hostname -s).1685182469.log
CMD: onyx-72vm5.onyx.whamcloud.com grep -c /mnt/lustre' ' /proc/mounts
Stopping client onyx-72vm5.onyx.whamcloud.com /mnt/lustre (opts
CMD: onyx-72vm5.onyx.whamcloud.com lsof -t /mnt/lustre
CMD: onyx-72vm5.onyx.whamcloud.com umount /mnt/lustre 2>&1
Starting client: onyx-72vm5.onyx.whamcloud.com: -o user_xattr,flock onyx-72vm9@tcp:/lustre /mnt/lustre
CMD: onyx-72vm5.onyx.whamcloud.com mkdir -p /mnt/lustre
CMD: onyx-72vm5.onyx.whamcloud.com mount -t lustre -o user_xattr,flock onyx-72vm9@tcp:/lustre /mnt/lustre

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
